summary: Reviewed source NAP-SRC-0010 (Student Licence) for Miss Anfal Elbushra. The tenancy agreement states a total rent of £4,686.18 including a £500 advance payment, with monthly instalments due per a separate rent schedule. The rent schedule and payment records are not included in this source. A follow-up task is proposed to locate the rent schedule and payment records.
